programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A female scientist who spent 12 years raising rats in a stressed environment in the hopes of evolving their intelligence faces the terrifying results of her experiment

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A black comedy about a psychiatrist who attempts to use a man who can turn into an unstoppable monster whenever his repressed anger is let loose through hypnosis to get rid of his annoying wife

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A man with a fear of the dark accepts a job working in the dark sewers of Springwood And a video store clerk keeps having nightmares

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt2
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: In 1942 two German battle-cruisers the Scharnhorst and the Gneisenau put into a French port for repairs and became trapped there targets to be bombed at will by the RAF It was only a matter of time before they would attempt an escape Churchill ordered that the ships must not reach Germany and that they must be destroyed The plan to do so was called Operation Fuller However when the moment came to put the operation into action the plans were locked in a safe and the only man with a key was away on holiday What happened next was a series of one farcical mistake after another which allowed the two German ships to sail right up the English channel and home to Germany The programme also features Operation Eagle Claw the clandestine operation ordered by President Carter in 1980 to free the American hostages held in the Tehran embassy The newly formed Special Operations Group Delta Force began planning a daring rescue However inter-service rivalry intervened with tragic results when the American aircraft carrying the rescue teams crashed into each other in the Iranian desert

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: Costly defeats made possible by commanders who disastrously underestimated their enemies

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt3
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: The Hunt For The Hood
programme.desc: The Hunt to Find Britains Greatest Battleship She was a mighty symbol of Britains greatness yet she was destroyed in just three-and-a-half minutes Had the ship been fatally weakened by her twenty long years of all-but-continuous operations on the high seas Hopefully resurrecting this magnificent warship will provide the answers to the questions that have baffled a generation

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: During the Second World War the British commander of Singapore believed it to be an impregnable fortress until a numerically inferior Japanese Army overran it Similarly 12 years on the French lost the mountain garrison at Dien Bien Phu after failing to anticipate the resourcefulness of General Giap and his Vietmanese peasant army

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Battlefield Vietnam 2

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy and elderly man subjects himself to a revolutionary new treatment in order to please his gold-digger girlfriend Unfortunately becoming young again turns out to be very expensive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A psychologist causes the terrors of a disturbed patient hes treating to haunt him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick goes undercover and joins a cult to investigate the death of a city officials son

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A college student dreams of becoming a werewolf and discovers an antique camera that will turn him into his favorite movie monster

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the McCoys learn that hometown girl Glory is a Hollywood celebrity Luke fears Kate will be dissatisfied with her life when the McCoys visit her so when Glory comes to visit the McCoy men try to paint Kates life rosier than it is

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ relocates to California and assembles a team of lady truckers to run a lucrative load from Los Angeles to San Francisco But BJs operation threatens to derail the gravy trains of Trans Cal Trucking and SCAT Captain Rutherford T Grant

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Col Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan involving a prisoner swap winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When the gangs hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While mixing business with pleasure on an island plantation Parker must pose as a Frenchman in order to avoid capture while he reports details on a Japanese radio-jamming operation

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A mix-up with a dictating machine brings a big but poorly-timed Mothers Day surprise for Parker Gruber and Tinker

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Newlywed Gary Cole goes to buy some jewelry for his wife Wendy and disappears When Wendy realizes hes missing nobody that she questions seems to recognize the couple Her hysteria only hampers Dans investigation

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: An innocent woman is blackmailed by her ex-husband into using their son to extort money from Jonathan

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael breaks up with Stephanie after Dick tells him not to always let her have her way

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry after watching Jeopardy decides to try and get his high school equivalency So he asks Dick to help him When he fails the test Dick goes to the teacher and convinces him to give Larry another try and to test him as if he was on Jeopardy And Joanna upon seeing the Inns rating in the Vermont guide go down sets out to restore it So she drives George and Stephanie crazy

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A monster resembling a wolf is attacking and killing teenage runaways who live in an abandoned building which is condemned after being demolished by a series of earthquakes Mitch and Ryan investigate and discover from hair samples from the monster that resemble a mythical wolf man from Yugoslavia named Zargtha

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The teams work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee his daughter and her rageaholic boyfriend

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale

programme.title: Tight Spot
programme.desc: Sherry is a tough woman with a violent past She is asked by the DA to testify against a mobster but she refuses because other witnesses were murdered Soon she falls in love with a policeman

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 214
programme.desc: Hercules 214

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zoor

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The Swamp Maiden seduces Obo before turning him into a monster

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy loses her job at the Boars Nest for asking for a raise Enos suggests she apply to become a deputy with the Hazzard County Sheriffs Department Boss and acting Sheriff Grady Byrd rig the tests but Daisy passes them all She more than proves her worth when she takes on a pair of experienced bank robbers

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.desc: The return of a Spanish nobleman with a claim to land in the Valley which is already occupied becomes further complicated by a romance between Heath and the noblemans daughter

programme.title: Cheyenne

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: Death Race 2000
programme.desc: In a dystopian future a cross country automobile race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians to gain points that are tallied based on each kills brutality

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses a reversing machine to rob casinos in Las Vegas Matt calls in the MASK team to stop the heists and return the money

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain are warned that MAD plan to steal rare pieces of art from the Modern Art Museum in New York and replace them with fakes

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides race to locate the ruins of an ancient GoBotic spacecraft which was carrying a powerful weapon when it crashed into the South American jungle long ago

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: An intergalactic sports promoter captures Renegades and Guardians and pits them against each other on Gameworld
